title: Collectr Alternative
description: A cleaner Collectr alternative for MTG tracking.

hero.title: Collectr Alternative
hero.description: Spellvault is a Collectr alternative for MTG price tracking, scanning, and inventory management.

sections.title: Why use this Collectr alternative
sections.description: Spellvault keeps card scanning, collection organization, and price tracking connected.

items.title: Track collection value
items.description: See total value and card-level context together.

items.title: Scan new cards
items.description: Bring new cards into your collection without extra friction.

items.title: Organize inventory
items.description: Use folders, binders, and structure to keep the collection usable.

sections.title: Spellvault vs Collectr
sections.description: The differences that matter when you want more than a simple portfolio view.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Common questions when comparing Spellvault and Collectr.

items.title: Is Spellvault a good Collectr alternative?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault works well if you want price tracking plus stronger scanning and collection structure.

items.title: What makes Spellvault different from Collectr?
items.description: Spellvault focuses more on connected inventory workflows rather than just a value snapshot.

items.title: Can I scan cards in Spellvault?
items.description: Yes. Scanning is part of the workflow, which makes it useful as a Collectr alternative.

items.title: Who should consider a Collectr alternative?
items.description: Collectors and sellers who want more control over inventory structure should consider it.
